headline: All You Need to Know About Jabil (JBL) Rating Upgrade to Strong Buy
summary: Jabil (JBL) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.
